title: ctenium elegans
intro: Ctenium elegans, also known as the silver broom grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of certain flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Ctenium elegans include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for treating colds and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
